special offer
Shield of Justice Elder Totem

Once in a while, the unit removes all negative effects from self, restores 30% health and gains a shield that blocks 50% damage of any type and exists up to 3 sec. When the shield expires or is removed, the unit stuns all enemy units in a large radius around for 2 sec., and deals pure damage equal to 200% of the caster's physical armor.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit removes all negative effects from self, restores 40% health and gains a shield that blocks 60% damage of any type and exists up to 4 sec. When the shield expires or is removed, the unit stuns all enemy units in a large radius around for 3 sec., and deals pure damage equal to 250% of the caster's physical armor.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit removes all negative effects from self, restores 50% health and gains a shield that blocks 70% damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. When the shield expires or is removed, the unit stuns all enemy units in a large radius around for 4 sec., and deals pure damage equal to 300% of the caster's physical armor.

Requirements: 90
